conditional_columns.evidence: Included only when request.evidence is true.
conditional_columns.reason: Always present; empty unless request.reason is true.

column_definitions.from_name: Raw source name from the earlier period.
column_definitions.to_name: Raw target name from the later period; nullable for no-match and unknown rows.
column_definitions.from_canonical_name: Normalized source name used for lexical matching.
column_definitions.to_canonical_name: Normalized target name used for lexical matching.
column_definitions.from_id: Source ID from the user column or internal fallback key.
column_definitions.to_id: Target ID from the user column or internal fallback key.
column_definitions.link_type: One of rename, split, merge, transfer, no_match, or unknown.
column_definitions.evidence: Short factual summary with no chain-of-thought; included only when request.evidence is true.
column_definitions.reason: Optional fuller explanation. Empty by default unless reason mode is enabled.
column_definitions.constraints_passed: JSON object of boolean checks such as candidate_membership and exact_match.
column_definitions.<exact_match columns>: User-provided exact-match context columns appended dynamically.
column_definitions.review_flags: List of QA flags for manual review.

notes.exact_match_columns: Appended dynamically when provided in request.exact_match.
notes.many_to_many: Multiple rows per from_key and per to_key are allowed.
notes.resume_source: links_raw.jsonl is the resumability source of truth inside each run directory.
